item.text: I’m tracing the `AgentRuntime` trait definition and every concrete `impl` from the repo itself, then I’ll report the exact workspace-relative paths with each claim backed by shell lookups.
I found the trait declaration and the candidate implementors. I’m doing one more pass on the exact files so the final list is complete and tied to the actual `impl` sites, not just filename guesses.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc 'for f in crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/claude/claude_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/ollama/ollama_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/codex/codex_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/gemini/gemini_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/mock_agent/mock_agent_runtime.rs; do echo "FILE: $f"; rg -n "impl'"\\s+AgentRuntime\\s+for\" \""'$f"; done'

/bin/zsh -lc 'for f in crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/claude/claude_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/ollama/ollama_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/codex/codex_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/gemini/gemini_runtime.rs crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/mock_agent/mock_agent_runtime.rs; do echo "FILE: $f"; rg -n "impl'"\\s+AgentRuntime\\s+for\" \""'$f"; done'

item.text:
`AgentRuntime` is defined at `crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/runtime_trait.rs` (verified from the trait declaration in that file).

Implementors:
- `ClaudeRuntime` — `crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/claude/claude_runtime.rs`
- `OllamaRuntime` — `crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/ollama/ollama_runtime.rs`
- `CodexRuntime` — `crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/codex/codex_runtime.rs`
- `GeminiRuntime` — `crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/gemini/gemini_runtime.rs`
- `MockAgentRuntime` — `crates/orbit-agent/src/providers/mock_agent/mock_agent_runtime.rs`

I also verified with a repo-wide search for `impl AgentRuntime for` under `crates/orbit-agent/src`; those five are the complete set of concrete impls currently in the workspace.
